subject: Fermi GBM trigger 150613619 is not a GRB
body:
"P. Jenke (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 455899872/150613619
at 14:51:09.66 UT on the 13th of June 2015, tentatively classified
as a GRB, is in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is due to local particles."
